title: Al-Ma'mun's appointment of 'Abdallah b. Tahir as governor of al-Jazirah and Syria with the task of suppressing the revolt thereof Nasr b. Shabath
description: Al-Ma'mun's appointment of 'Abdallah b. Tahir as governor of al-Jazirah and Syria with the task of suppressing the revolt thereof Nasr b. Shabath. Recorded under the year 206 AH (c. 821 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
